title: Customer Review Sentiment & Aspect Extraction Pipeline
summary: Fine-tuned BERT for aspect-level sentiment analysis on Amazon reviews, extracting structured (aspect, opinion, sentiment) triplets with MLflow experiment tracking.
body:
## Problem

Unstructured customer reviews contain valuable but hard-to-extract signals: not just overall sentiment but which specific product aspects (battery, screen, price) are praised or criticised.

## Approach

Fine-tuned BERT for aspect-level sentiment analysis on Amazon product reviews. The pipeline extracts structured (aspect, opinion, sentiment) triplets across 8 product categories. End-to-end preprocessing, training, and evaluation is automated with MLflow experiment tracking for reproducibility.

## Results

Successfully extracted structured triplets across 8 product categories. MLflow tracking enabled systematic comparison of fine-tuning configurations and hyperparameters.
